description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Build that runs on push events with a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run a build job on different operating systems and compilers, including ubuntu-22.04 with GCC and Clang, and ubuntu-latest with Qt 6 and GCC. For each job, check out the source code, enable and set up ccache, install dependencies, build with CMake, run tests, and update coverage if applicable.
